message:
feat(vector): add type counts and unified VectorIndex interface

MmapVectorIndex additions:
- type_counts(): Returns HashMap of embedding counts by document type,
  enabling statistics on index composition (tweets, DMs, likes, etc.)

New VectorIndex enum:
- Unified interface wrapping either Mmap or InMemory implementations
- load_from_file_or_storage(): Tries file loading (Mmap) first, falls
  back to storage (InMemory) if unavailable
- Enables seamless switching between implementations based on
  availability and use case

E2E tests:
- semantic_pipeline_e2e.rs: End-to-end tests for semantic search pipeline

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
